subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness that there is none other God but Me, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. All things have spoken forth in the Days of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم قد نطقت الاشیاء فی ایام الله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
